bullets: Built a complete multi-vendor e-commerce application from scratch, handling backend, frontend, and database setup.
Implemented Laravel with Inertia.js for smooth SPA-like navigation and PostgreSQL for structured data storage.
Set up Docker for development and deployment environments, managing production-ready configurations.
Designed and launched the official club website using React and Firebase to share event details and resources.
Developed internal tools to manage event registrations and records.

projects.name: Audiophile - Modern E-commerce Platform
bullets: Built a full-featured e-commerce application with Next.js 15 using App Router and server-side validation.
Integrated global state management using Zustand and a persistent PostgreSQL database via Prisma ORM for robust data handling.
Implemented a pixel-perfect, fully responsive UI following the Audiophile design system with secure checkout functionality.

projects.name: Frontend Mentor Challenges
bullets: Completed 30+ from newbie to advanced front-end challenges to improve responsive design, accessibility, and JavaScript interactivity skills.

projects.name: Snapcast - Screen Recording & Video Sharing Platform
bullets: Built a full-stack video platform with screen recording, AI-generated transcripts, and video streaming using Bunny.net CDN for global content delivery.
Implemented secure authentication with Better Auth, integrated Arcjet for bot protection and rate limiting, and used Xata for serverless PostgreSQL database management.

projects.name: AI-Powered Chatbot
bullets: Created a chatbot application using Gemini API, Laravel, Inertia.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.
Focused on learning API integration and building a simple, responsive chat interface.
